description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named uno_binary_size that runs on push and pull request events to the master branch. Use two jobs, build and build_no_forced_inline, both based on the build_template_binary_size.yml template. For build, pass board=uno, max_size=11000, and max_size_apa102=9300. For build_no_forced_inline, pass the same parameters with extra_args=--defines FASTLED_NO_FORCE_INLINE and unlimited max sizes.
